description: Labeled extraction fixtures for scripts/eval-extraction.mjs. Labels are human ground truth for what is plainly visible — not model outputs. Built from committed fixture images; extend with reviewer-override frames when local copies exist (never call the live DB from this harness).

fixtures.notes: Paved single-track lane with grass/shoulder verges on both sides; no raised sidewalk, curb walkway, or bollard-protected path. Utility pole and houses in the distance.
Shop interior (pulpería), not a street. Correct answer is unusable.
